title: Fuel, fertiliser prices may remain high for prolonged period: IMF, World Bank, IEA
content:
Fuel and fertiliser prices are projected to remain elevated.
*   This period of high prices is expected to be prolonged.
*   This assessment comes from leading international bodies: the IMF, World Bank, and IEA.

title: Retail inflation inches up to 3.4% in March
content:
Retail inflation experienced a slight increase.
*   The inflation rate now stands at 3.4%.
*   These figures are reported for the month of March.

title: World Bank chief sounds alarm about looming jobs crisis even after war ends
content:
The World Bank chief has issued a serious warning about an impending global jobs crisis.
*   This "looming" crisis is anticipated to severely impact employment worldwide.
*   The concern emphasizes that these job challenges will persist even after current wars and conflicts have concluded.

title: Gold drops as inflation worries linger on failed U.S.-Iran talks
content:
Gold prices have dropped.
*   The decline is primarily due to persistent worries about inflation.
*   These inflation concerns were intensified by the failure of U.S.-Iran talks.

title: RBI scrutinises how banks unwound Rupee arbitrage, says sources
content:
The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) is scrutinizing commercial banks.
*   The scrutiny centers on the methods banks used to close out their Rupee arbitrage positions.
*   This information has been reported by unnamed sources.

title: Supreme Court expresses ‘shock’ at the impunity of Chambal sand miners
content:
The Supreme Court has expressed profound 'shock' regarding the activities of sand miners.
*   Their concern specifically targets the 'impunity' (freedom from punishment) with which these miners operate.
*   The issue highlighted involves sand mining operations in the Chambal region.
